label: Internet Users (2023)
description: Total number of internet users in Pakistan as of 2023, representing significant growth from just 1.2 million users in 2000. Source: Pakistan Telecommunication Authority (PTA)

label: Internet Penetration Rate
description: Percentage of Pakistan's population with access to the internet as of 2023, up from less than 0.1% in 2000. Mobile internet drives most of this growth. Source: PTA Annual Report 2023

label: Mobile Broadband Users
description: Number of mobile broadband subscribers in Pakistan, accounting for approximately 85% of all internet users. 4G subscribers represent the majority of mobile internet users. Source: PTA Quarterly Reports

label: Fixed Broadband Subscribers
description: Number of fixed broadband connections including DSL, fiber, and wireless broadband. Growth has been steady with fiber optic connections showing fastest expansion. Source: PTA Statistics

label: Licensed Internet Service Providers
description: Total number of licensed ISPs in Pakistan as of 2023, including both active and inactive licenses. This represents significant industry growth and competition since 2000. Source: PTA Licensed ISP List

label: Average Internet Speed (Fixed)
description: Average download speed for fixed broadband connections in Pakistan as measured by global speed tests. Significant improvement from sub-1 Mbps speeds in early 2000s. Source: Speedtest Global Index

label: E-commerce Growth Rate (2022-2023)
description: Year-over-year growth in e-commerce transactions, driven by improved internet infrastructure and digital payment adoption. Online shopping has become mainstream. Source: State Bank of Pakistan

label: Digital Payment Users
description: Number of active digital payment users including mobile wallets, online banking, and digital payment platforms. Shows rapid adoption of fintech solutions. Source: State Bank of Pakistan Payment Systems Review
